[Company Letterhead]

Date: 15 October 2023

Subject: Employment Offer

Dear Mr. Jonathan Tan,

We are pleased to extend an offer of employment to you for the position of Senior Software Engineer at Tech Innovators Pte Ltd, UEN: 202312345H. Your starting salary will be SGD 85,000 per annum, payable monthly. This position is based at our office located at 123 Innovation Drive, Singapore 567890.

Please note that your employment is contingent upon the successful verification of your qualifications and the receipt of your signed acceptance. You may contact our HR department at +65 6123 4567 or hr@techinnovators.sg should you have any questions.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team. Kindly confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing below and returning it to us no later than 22 October 2023.

Sincerely,

Dr. Emily Lim  
Director of Human Resources  
Tech Innovators Pte Ltd

NRIC: S8765432B

[Signature Line]
